sourceSizeDeviation.rule: The fresh reproducible census wins over the historical progress-table estimate.

scope.goal: Create the N5 mechanical source-size gate and reduce oversized files through contract-preserving ownership splits.
nonGoals: No new product feature, route, schema, report, evidence chain, or execution authority
No change to public module entry paths
No test expectation or fixture-byte change
No Java or mini-kv write, build, test, start, or stop

necessityProof.blockerResolved: E9 had no complete src census and no gate capable of rejecting a newly oversized file.
necessityProof.consumer: N5 close review and Phase 3 E1-E10 evidence consume the final census and ratchet.
necessityProof.whyExistingSurfaceWasInsufficient: The historical managed-audit code-health profile lists only three named files and allows limits above 800; it is an operator report, not a repository-wide failing gate.
necessityProof.stopCondition: v2189 reports zero files above 800 lines, the same ratchet remains green with an empty remediation baseline, and external N5 review passes.

failureClasses: remediation file growth above its pinned ceiling
oversized file count above the shrink-only maximum

ownershipCorrection.initialFailure: governanceGrowthRatchet reported 1131 root service files against the frozen 1125 ceiling
ownershipCorrection.resolution: Classify extracted data by responsibility: public data shapes live in src/contracts and immutable cross-project evidence lives in src/evidence; service loaders/renderers remain in src/services.

splits.boundary: Public profile/category/message types; original module re-exports the same names.
Immutable Java v63 and mini-kv v72 retention fixture references.
Immutable Java v56 and mini-kv v65 bundle manifests.
Immutable Java rollback and mini-kv restore handoff evidence.

validation.command: npx vitest run six affected contract files plus test/sourceSizeRatchet.test.ts --maxWorkers=2
npx vitest run test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts plus the ratchet and six affected contract files
validation.result: 8 files passed, 25 tests passed after the ownership correction; service and route file-count ceilings remained unchanged

validation.command: complete renderer migration parity suite in an independent core.autocrlf=false worktree
validation.result: 11 files passed, 15 tests passed on the final contracts/evidence ownership layout; LF probe contained 0 CR bytes
All 8 deterministic shards passed on the final tree: 545 files and 1661 tests, aggregate Vitest duration 4641.19 seconds.

validation.command: npm run typecheck && npm run build
validation.result: Both passed on the final ownership layout.
245 total / 242 standardized / 3 AST-validated waivers / 0 non-waived unstandardized.
1223 source files scanned; 10 oversized files exactly match the shrink-only baseline; no violations.

screenshot.reason: This version changes module ownership and repository gates only; it introduces no renderable HTML or UI behavior.
